query: Help me write a hook that changes my Claude Code statusline to show the current branch and the model name.
expected_behavior: Does NOT engage the hook authoring workflow (script structure, event registration, security review) for a statusline configuration request
Recommends configuring the statusline through the settings.json statusLine field (or the /statusline-setup skill) — statusline is declarative configuration, not an event-driven hook
Explains that hooks fire on runtime events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, Stop) and are the wrong artifact for UI / display customization
